name: BLACK DADSR EG
subtitle: Delay-Attack-Decay-Sustain-Release Envelope Generator
summary: A fully analogue exponential DADSR (Delay-Attack-Decay-Sustain-Release) envelope generator with CV control over every stage. The D stage is an independent gate delay section that holds the gate before the envelope fires, enabling delayed modulation and staggered event design. Includes a looping function and manual gate button.
